name: type-resolution-pattern
description: helpers-type-resolution.ts shows recursive schema traversal with visited set to prevent infinite loops. Uses let+assignment pattern for mutual recursion (esbuild compatibility). DDL type mapping should follow similar recursion-safe pattern.
relevantCode:
let resolveTypeDefinitionImpl: (def: any, allDefs: Record<string, any>, visited: Set<string>) => any
let resolvePropertyTypeImpl: (propName: string, propSchema: any, allDefs: Record<string, any>, visited: Set<string>) => any
recommendation: Use visited Set<string> pattern for traversing model dependencies in topological sort to handle circular/self-references.
